topic: My garden has a row of footprints leading from my back porch to my fence with no return prints
title: A Row of Footprints Leads from My Back Porch to My Fence. There Are No Return Prints. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A single row of footprints leads from my back porch to the fence. No return prints.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small suburban backyard at dawn with a single line of bare footprints leading from a wooden porch to a six foot wooden fence, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Small backyard. Six foot wooden fence. Lived here four years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a small fenced suburban backyard in late afternoon, no people visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Coffee on the porch every morning.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a coffee mug resting on a porch railing, the backyard visible in soft focus, dim early morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tuesday in April. Fresh frost. Saw the prints from the kitchen window.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a backyard at dawn covered in frost with a line of footprints visible across the grass, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Went outside. Counted. Twenty seven prints.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a bare footprint pressed into frosty grass, the heel and toe shapes clearly visible, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Adult size. Bare feet. Heading from my porch toward the fence.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a single bare footprint on frosty ground with a small ruler beside it for scale, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Walked to the fence. Looked over.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a wooden privacy fence in a backyard with a person's hand visible on the top rail, only the hand shown, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Yard on the other side was untouched. No prints leading away. No prints leading back to mine.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a neighbor's manicured backyard seen over a wooden fence, the grass undisturbed, no footprints, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next morning. Same prints. Different angle. Heading from the porch.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a backyard at dawn with a second slightly different line of footprints leading toward the same fence, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I started counting them. Each morning there is one more print. The line is growing.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a notepad with handwritten daily counts of footprints, a pen across the page, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is approaching my back door now.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wooden porch step with frosty bare footprints visible on the boards leading toward a closed back door, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have not stood on my porch in three weeks.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a back porch viewed from inside through a screen door, a coffee mug sitting on the railing untouched, dim early morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
